entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A major food legume and important source of protein cultivated in south Asia and sub-Saharan Africa

entities.name: SOUTH ASIA
entities.description: Region where chickpea is cultivated

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: Region where chickpea is cultivated

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Stresses that lead to significant yield losses in chickpea

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Stresses that lead to significant yield losses in chickpea

entities.name: WEEDS
entities.description: Organisms that reduce chickpea yield by up to 84% to 98%

entities.name: HAND WEEDING
entities.description: Traditional weed control method that is becoming expensive

entities.name: MECHANICAL WEED CONTROL
entities.description: Traditional weed control method that is becoming expensive

entities.name: HERBICIDE TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of chickpea cultivars to withstand herbicide application for weed control

entities.name: IMIDAZOLINONE
entities.description: A group of herbicides used as a powerful means of weed control

entities.name: PROTEIN SYNTHESIS INHIBITORS
entities.description: The mechanism by which imidazolinones act

entities.name: ACETOHYDROXYACID SYNTHASE
entities.description: An enzyme also known as acetolactate synthase (ALS) that is inhibited by imidazolinones

entities.name: BRANCHED CHAIN AMINO ACIDS
entities.description: Products of the biosynthesis pathway involving the AHAS enzyme

entities.name: POINT MUTATION
entities.description: A genetic change at a specific position in the AHAS gene

entities.name: CYTOCINE675 TO THYMIN675
entities.description: A specific point mutation in the chickpea AHAS gene that confers resistance to imidazolinones

entities.name: KASPAR MARKER
entities.description: An allele-specific SNP marker used to predict phenotypic response to IMI herbicides

entities.name: EMS MUTAGENESIS
entities.description: Method used to develop mutant lines in the background of JG 11 and KAK 2

entities.name: JG 11
entities.description: A chickpea cultivar used as a background for mutant lines and as a check variety

entities.name: KAK 2
entities.description: A chickpea cultivar used as a background for mutant lines and as a check variety

entities.name: ICRISAT PATANCHERU
entities.description: The location where phenotyping for herbicide resistance was conducted

entities.name: RABI
entities.description: The season during which phenotyping was conducted in 2016

entities.name: PLANT INJURY SCALE
entities.description: A 1-5 scale used for phenotyping herbicide tolerance based on plant injury

entities.name: KLUSTERCALLER SOFTWARE
entities.description: Software used for graphical visualization of SNP genotyping data

entities.name: ALLELE C
entities.description: An allele associated with IMI susceptibility

entities.name: CAPS MARKER
entities.description: A marker converted from a selected SNP to analyze allelic variation associated with herbicide tolerance

entities.name: AMPLICON SEQUENCING
entities.description: A suggested method for sequencing the AHAS gene to identify alternate alleles
